case_title: ASUNCION, MICHELE N. vs. PARK, JUN KYU et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASUNCION, MICHELE N. AS TO DEFENDANT PARK, JUN KYU DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-13-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-24-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-17-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-17-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AS TO WHY TRANSFER HAS NOT BEEN EFFECTED. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR MAY-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE THAT A MOTION TO TRANSFER AND CONSOLIDATE W/	74002 HAS BEEN FILED IN SUPERIOR COURT, SET FOR 3/5/96 #10 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASUNCION, MICHELE N.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLTF. REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE OF STAT CONF. GRANTED PER DEPT. #4.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO ALLOW FOR TRANSFER. PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED ONLY IF CASE HAS BEEN TRANSFERRED AND ALL FEES PAID, ETC. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
TRANSFER ORDER; FEES PAID CERTIFIED COPY OF ORDER FROM SUPERIOR COURT TO CONSOLIDATE CASE WITH SUPERIOR COURT 	74002. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASUNCION, MICHELE N.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-13-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR CONTINUED STATUS CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CHANGE OF VENUE FEE CASE HAS BEEN TRANSFERRED & TO BE CONSOLIDATED WITH SUPERIOR COURT CASE 	74002. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASUNCION, MICHELE N.
